page_metadata.biotools__summary: GiNA is an open-source software  which is a simple tool for measuring horticultural traits such as shape- and color-related parameters of fruits, vegetables, and seeds for horticultural phenotyping.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GiNA is an open-source software  which is a simple tool for measuring horticultural traits such as shape- and color-related parameters of fruits, vegetables, and seeds for horticultural phenotyping.
